title: 將軍澳小店支持抗爭 屢被騷擾仍無懼打壓

replies.msg:
見到位於將軍澳坑口富寧花園呢間小店好支持抗爭
佢之前支持64 69 已經一直比人騷擾 但都無懼打壓 繼續為抗爭發聲
https://www.hk01.com/18區新聞/338204/逃犯條例-六四標語疑遭商場河蟹-坑口裝修舖再貼6-9遊行標語
從街坊口中得知佢因爲支持抗爭一直被騷擾
管理員都多次找佢麻煩
今日經過探訪佢冇特別怪管理員 認為佢地都係受上級壓力 最大問題係管理處公司
而佢都十分堅定 仲有意買部電視放店前播放正確資訊
希望大家可以多啲留意呢啲小店支持下佢地
可以同佢地傾下計
唔想因爲佢地支持抗爭反而影響生計
好有風骨

三、撤銷對今為所有反送中抗爭者控罪

四、徹底追究警隊濫權情況

五、以行政命令解散立法會，立即實行雙真普選

屌你老味！你咁諗就錯晒！大事大非既時候，依家成個勢根本就吹緊強大本土香港民意風，做生意，由其係小本生意，唔撚同人講清楚大家都係自已人，咁好既免費宣傳手段唔用幾時用？唔同跳出黎話支持民建聯支持警察打學生啊？佢出糧比我啊？所以我認為呢個時候仲唔表態，只係一味做生意，乜都唔關我事係最不智！

replies.msg: 整個小工程，例如換個水龍頭、之類乜都得，呢d屋村鋪仔一日做到幾單賺一千幾百都頂到，當然真正賺錢係做裝修

https://hk.news.appledaily.com/local/daily/article/20190702/20718410
裝修真漢子敲銀盤助陣

球叔的抗爭始於店舖櫥窗。自6月初，身為公司東主的他，在位於將軍澳富寧花園商場的洋江工程公司櫥窗上，貼上一張張他親自用毛筆書寫的反送中大字報和報章內容。有人向商場管理署施壓，投訴他違反商場管理守則和建築物條例，迫令他清除櫥窗上的所有內容。球叔愛理不理，心想：「塊玻璃係我嘅，我鍾意貼乜就貼乜，佢都吹唔我脹！最壞打算咪佢搵石頭或鎚仔扑爛我塊玻璃！」玻璃保住了，只是上面的大字報屢屢被人惡意撕毀，也不時有莫名其妙的人在店外拍照，甚至把沙粒倒灌店內。
推 依間野次次有抗爭都撐到出哂面

replies.msg:
Email:
info@funing.com.hk

Subject:
A letter of complaint



To whom it may concern,

We are writing to complain about your suppression of freedom of speech.

We learnt from Apple Daily and HK01 that, your tenant 洋江工程 has encountered unfair treatment for political reasons. His pull-up banner, with 1989 Tiananmen Square crackdown slogans on it, was removed impolitely by staff.

Meanwhile, there are several other tenants not keeping the place clear without receiving any warning. We thereby have sufficient reason to believe Funing Property Management have practiced censorship. The tenant has been targeted and your decision is formed solely based on political grounds. This is an obvious violation of civil rights - the rights of individuals to receive equal treatment.

Hong Kong residents shall have freedom of speech in accordance with Article 160 of the Basic Law of the Hong Kong Special Administrative. We condemn the repression of freedom of expression.

While the tenant agreed to remove the pull-up banner after lunch, a security guard torn the slogan off without permission. This is utmost disrespect and marked lack of professionalism.

Therefore, we urge you to rectify this situation by an official apology letter to the tenant. You may also want to re-educate your staff members to repair the damaged reputation.

We shall be obliged to a prompt reply as well as immediate improvement.

Yours faithfully,
_____________

replies.msg:
更新版


Email:
info@funing.com.hk

Subject:
A letter of complaint

——————————————————

To whom it may concern,

We are writing to complain about your suppression of freedom of speech and warn you of your illegal fly-tipping activities.

We learnt from Apple Daily and HK01 that, your tenant 洋江工程 has encountered unfair treatment for political reasons. His pull-up banner, with 1989 Tiananmen Square crackdown slogans on it, was removed impolitely by staff.

Meanwhile, there are several other tenants not keeping the place clear without receiving any warning. We thereby have sufficient reason to believe Funing Property Management have practiced censorship. The tenant has been targeted and your decision is formed solely based on political grounds. This is an obvious violation of civil rights - the rights of individuals to receive equal treatment.

Hong Kong residents shall have freedom of speech in accordance with Article 160 of the Basic Law of the Hong Kong Special Administrative. We condemn the repression of freedom of expression.

While the tenant agreed to remove the pull-up banner after lunch, a security guard torn the slogan off without permission. This is utmost disrespect and marked lack of professionalism.

We have also drawn attention to the illegal depositing of construction and demolition materials in front of the shop, which your staff member Mr. Jiang has confessed to. You might want to know fly-tipping activities can be enforced under the Waste Disposal Ordinance (Cap. 354) (WDO) if waste is deposited on on private land without the consent of the lawful occupiers.

Therefore, we urge you to rectify this situation by an official apology letter to the tenant. You may also want to re-educate your staff members to repair the damaged reputation and avoid undesirable legal consequences.

We shall be obliged to a prompt reply as well as immediate improvement.

Yours faithfully,
_____________
爸爸硬起來
